ranked_recommendations.name: Gokul Pure Veg - Gujarati & Punjabi Thali
SAN IDLI Vegetarian Restaurant & Indian Food

restaurants.name: Gokul Pure Veg - Gujarati & Punjabi Thali

reviews.text: It is a very small place. The service was good. The food was average. The kadhi was too watery, curries were bland, rotis too oily. Overall, for $10.99, it was ok.
This restaurant is serving Authentic Indian food. Their taste is same as you have in India. Must try: Gujarati Thali, Peri Peri Sandwich
Very nice, fresh food with excellent quality. The service is outstanding, and the place is clean, welcoming. Highly recommend the Peri Peri Sandwich!
Out of this world!!!
One of the Best Gujarati Food Restaurant in DFW. Dabeli, Vada Pav, Gujarati Thali, Khaman. Everything was great Authentic taste.

restaurants.sentiment_rationale: Overwhelmingly positive reviews praising authentic Gujarati flavors, with one lukewarm note calling the food average and bland.

restaurants.name: Marina Indian Restaurant

reviews.text: Highly recommend, we had the most amazing meal! They recommended the Tandoori mixed plate and the Dosas. Everything was delicious! Service was 10/10 we will be back.
Food was amazing
King fish fry was the ultimate one and of course biryani was exceptional as well. Thanks Marina, we will be back soon
The reason why I choose this rating is because the toilet is not clean and can see nasty stuff around the floor. The food is alright. The service is good and great customer service!

restaurants.sentiment_rationale: Food quality and service are consistently praised, though one reviewer flagged restroom cleanliness.

restaurants.name: Frisco BaseCamp Restaurant & Bar

reviews.text: Tasty food healthy atmosphere, yummy momo's
Loved it
Good food and good service
I wish I could leave negative stars. The veggie chowmien was SO unbearably spicy. I requested mild spice and got a furnace in my mouth.

restaurants.sentiment_rationale: Mostly enthusiastic reviews praising food and service, but one reviewer had a serious complaint about spice level not matching their request.

restaurants.name: Spicy Vihaar

reviews.text: I was here for buffet. Biryani is not fresh it may be the last day one. its not even good taste. No proper service.
Food is amazing, the staff and the service is really good and will definitely recommend this place.
The food was amazing!! One of the best in town and the service was good too especially Rupesh was very friendly.
Must-try buffet with a great variety of dishes. Good staff, great service, and highly recommended
Awesome staff, service and food. Gongura pulav taste is exceptional. Must revisit.

restaurants.menu_data_note: Menu page is a JS-rendered ordering platform; not machine-readable this run.
restaurants.sentiment_rationale: Four of five reviews are highly positive about food and service, but one flagged stale biryani and unresponsive service.

restaurants.name: SAN IDLI Vegetarian Restaurant & Indian Food

reviews.text: First time dining here tonight and all I can say is WOW. Their paneer bhurji dosa is one of the best I've ever had. We'll definitely be regulars here! Highly recommend
Food tasted amazing. Excellent service. Coffee tasted great! Paneer Fried rice was top notch.
I wish there were an option to give zero stars. This place is totally unhygienic, with no regard for cleanliness. Not recommended at all.
Ignore any negative comments about this place. This is the most authentic South Indian food bar none! The chapatis are fresh and piping hot.

restaurants.sentiment_rationale: Strong praise for authenticity and flavor is offset by a serious hygiene/cleanliness complaint that deserves attention.
